div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PERFORMANCE (revenue, EPS, FDA,
IPO/CIC -- a non-market metric)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MARKET (own/other share price,
TSR, a price hurdle)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: What kind of condition gates the award?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Not in grant-date FV.
Recognize cost only for awards that
ultimately vest. REVERSE if the
employee leaves pre-vest

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Not in grant-date FV.
Accrue ONLY when achievement is probable;
start/stop/catch-up as probability changes.
REVERSE to zero if it fails

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Priced INTO grant-date FV via
Monte Carlo / lattice.
Do NOT reverse if the target is missed,
provided requisite service is rendered
